mapper.select: select reqid, aprvlineid, seq, stepname, status, approverid, approvername, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as regdate, comment from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalstepreq a order by reqid desc, aprvlineid, seq
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_piiapprovalstepreq (reqid, aprvlineid, seq, stepname, status, approverid, approvername, regdate, comment) values (#{reqid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approverid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvername, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, now(), #{comment, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into COTDL.tbl_piiapprovalstepreq (reqid, aprvlineid, seq, stepname, status, approverid, approvername, regdate, comment) values (#{reqid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approverid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvername, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, now(), #{comment, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalstepreq set phase= 'REJECTED', upddate = NOW() where reqid= #{reqid}
update cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalstepreq set seq= #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phase= #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approvedate = NOW() where reqid= #{reqid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
